name: single_day_history_falls_back_to_vol_zero
description: A single day of OHLC. len(valid_dates) = 1 < 15 -> ATR falls back to calculate_20d_vol. Vol sees 1 < 20 -> returns 0.0. Catches an impl that would crash on a 1-element slice (e.g., np.mean of an empty tr_list).
derivation: valid_dates length 1 < 15 -> ATR returns calculate_20d_vol(...). vol sees 1 < 20 -> returns 0.0.
